title: Tab Name Tag
description: A client-side mod that replaces player name tags with their tab list names.
body:
# Tab Name Tag mod

**No dependencies**

---

This is a client-side mod that replaces the default player name tags (shown above players' heads) with the names shown in the tab list (player list). It ensures that nicknames, prefixes, or team-based colors used in the tab list are also reflected in the in-world name tags. This creates a more unified and consistent look when playing on servers that customize tab list names.

---

(about forge) If you want to use it with forge, download the [forge port (1.20.1)](https://github.com/Shihyeon/TabNameTag/issues/1). versions other than 1.20.1 are not supported
